# Dakshna

> South Asian wedding vendor directory — Astro 5, Cloudflare Pages, SSG, Zod content schema.

## MCP Access

- [GitMCP Server](https://gitmcp.io/adirola/dakshna): Zero-config MCP endpoint. AI agents (Cursor, Claude, Copilot) can read repo files via this URL.

## Repository

- [GitHub](https://github.com/adirola/dakshna): Full source code (public after launch)
- [Sitemap](https://dakshna.com/sitemap-index.xml): All vendor listing URLs

## Key Paths

- `src/content/vendors/`: Vendor `.md` listing files (Zod-validated)
- `src/content.config.ts`: Content collection schema
- `src/components/`: Astro UI components
- `public/llms.txt`: This file

## Optional

- [Full llms.txt](https://dakshna.com/llms-full.txt): Extended version with all vendor listings (Task 11)
